assertions.title: TTS settings persist after page refresh

steps.observed: Voice dropdown updated, PUT request sent

steps.expected: Page reloads with new voice selected

evidence.network: PUT /api/settings triggered on voice change, GET /api/settings on reload

assertions.title: TTS settings save successfully via API

steps.observed: PUT request to /api/settings confirmed via network monitoring
PUT request sent with TTS settings

evidence.network: PUT http://localhost:3101/api/settings (fetch) - 2 PUT requests observed during voice change flow

assertions.title: TTS voice playback uses saved voice

steps.action: Set voice to en-US-ChristopherNeural in Settings

steps.observed: Could not start session - no active meditation button visible after onboarding
Cannot test - session start flow not accessible

assertions.issues: Could not access meditation session start. The home page shows onboarding form repeatedly. Unable to navigate to actual meditation flow.

assertions.title: TTS settings apply in meditation session

steps.observed: Cannot access meditation session - home page shows onboarding form

assertions.issues: Meditation session not accessible from current browser state. Home page continues to show onboarding form despite profile existing.

frictions.description: Onboarding form reappears on home page even though profile was created
frictions.resolution: Profile exists (verified via API), but home page still shows onboarding form instead of meditation controls

blockers.description: Cannot navigate to meditation session from home page - onboarding form persists
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Navigated directly to /settings, refreshed page, created new profile - issue persists

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-TTS-004, VAL-TTS-005), 2 blocked (VAL-TTS-006, VAL-CROSS-001). Settings persistence works. API saves correctly. Meditation session not accessible due to onboarding flow issue.
